title: Korak 9

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: Trebalo bi da snimite poruku The word "<platform>" was sliced from the message., gde <platform> treba zameniti stvarnom vrednošću parametra.
tests.testString: assert.deepInclude(spy.calls, ['The word "freeCodeCamp" was sliced from the message.']);

description:
Sada je vreme za snimanje rezultata korišćenjem metode slice().

Koristite niz znakova šablona ili niz znakova za snimanje poruke The word "<platform>" was sliced from the message. u konzolu. Zamenite <platform> stvarnom vrednošću parametra.
